docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,712.00 FILED BY KUNKEL LAUREN AS TO DEFENDANT NIEHUS CAROL ANNE DBA CAROL NIEHUS & ASSOCIATES BROADCAST DESIGNERS' ASSOCIATION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
